title: gymnadenia conopsea f. comigera
intro: Gymnadenia conopsea f. comigera, also known as the Fragrant Orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antispasmodic. Gymnadenia conopsea f. comigera is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
